command: xcodebuild -quiet -project Spoonjoy.xcodeproj -scheme "Spoonjoy iOS" -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
reason: Local Xcode cannot find an eligible iOS simulator destination because no simulator devices are available and iOS 26.5 is not installed.
ownerAction: Install the required iOS platform/runtime in Xcode Settings > Components and rerun iOS app bundle validation.
